---
name: Bug report
about: Template for reporting bugs
title: "[BUG]"
labels: bug
assignees: dev4ones-space

---

## General properties of report
- **Bug's priority scale** _(basically if bug is critical, or something innocent that not that important)_: Critical _(should be fixed immediately)_ // Medium _(not that important, but needs to be fixed soon)_ // Low _(bug that can be resolved last in list, not important at all, like it doesn't affect work of service much)_
- **Device/Other**: 
    - **OS**: macOS/Linux, {distro} ({distro family, ex. Debian, Arch})
    - **Arch**: x86_64/ARM64  _(note! we take priority of issue in the lowest if device is not 64 bit)_
    - **How run** _(if it was took from releases or compiled and other)_ : Using binary from GitHub Releases // Compiled locally _(please include for you compiled too)_ // Other _(include how)_

## Bug description
{describe bug}

## How to reproduce it
{just ignore if you cannot or is it random occuring}

## Additional info
{more info that you want to include}
